first_chat: Type something you've actually been thinking about. Not a test — a real one. Cards will appear as you talk.
vault_empty: Your cards will appear here as you talk to Rodix. We don't write them — your thinking does.
vault_search_no_results: Nothing matches that search yet. Try a different phrase, or a topic you've thought about recently.
vault_filter_no_results: No cards under that filter. Clear it to see everything, or try another topic.
import_zero_imported: We didn't find anything to import. That's fine — start with a conversation, the vault grows from there.
recall_no_history: No past cards to bring back yet. They'll surface as topics return across conversations.
first_insight_pending: Threads need a few cards before they're visible. Keep going — usually around five on a topic.
export_nothing_to_export: Nothing to export yet. Once cards exist, this button gives you markdown files — your hard drive, your call.
settings_no_recent_activity: No recent activity. Telemetry is intentionally light here — we don't track engagement metrics.
search_idle: Search across topics, concerns, hopes, and open questions. Your wording, not paraphrased.
